computed.formula: See domain_rules for spent computation logic
COALESCE(SUM(kr.progress_pct * kr.weight) / NULLIF(SUM(kr.weight),0), 0) for objectives; ((current_value - start_value)/(target_value - start_value))*100 for metric KRs

projects.description: Close project and set status to completed

milestones.description: List milestones with optional project_id filter

tasks.description: Add a dependency to a task

labels.description: List labels, optionally filtered by project_id

events.name: task.assigned
events.client_action: invalidate tasks.detail, show notification if assignee === current user

flows.name: Track Progress
steps: If all milestone tasks done: milestone can be marked achieved
If all tasks done: project can be closed

flows.name: Manage Dependencies
steps: If dependency not met: task cannot change status to in_progress
cross_entity_updates: Dependency record created, task status transitions gated

computed_fields.formula: COUNT(tasks WHERE status=done) / COUNT(tasks WHERE status != cancelled) * 100
COUNT(tasks WHERE due_date < NOW() AND status NOT IN [done, cancelled])
SUM(time_entries.hours * billable_rate WHERE project_id=id) if time tracking integrated, else 0

domain_rules.api_guard: Detect cycle using DFS before creating dependency

domain_rules.rule: Task cannot start if blocking dependency not done
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 409 if status→in_progress and has unmet finish_to_start dependency
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable status change to in_progress if dependency unmet

domain_rules.rule: Project end_date must be after start_date
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable end_date before start_date in DatePicker

domain_rules.rule: Only project team members can be assigned tasks
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate assignee_id in project_team_members before save
Return 403 if project is_archived=true on mutating requests
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable all edit controls, show archived banner

generation_rules: KanbanBoard uses boardStore for drag state via DnD Kit
CalendarView uses calendarStore for view mode and selected date
GanttChart renders phases, milestones, and tasks on a shared timeline with DependencyArrow SVG overlays
Every mutation hook implements onMutate (optimistic update), onError (rollback), onSettled (invalidate)
All forms use React Hook Form with Zod schema validation
Authenticated requests attach JWT from authStore via Axios interceptor
WebSocket events handled in a global SocketProvider with per-event invalidation logic
All lists support infinite scroll via TanStack Query useInfiniteQuery

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
